prediction.reasoning: Based on typical stock volatility patterns, CI (Cigna) as a large healthcare stock typically exhibits moderate volatility with annual volatility around 25-30%. For a 20-day forecast, I applied a geometric Brownian motion model assuming slight positive drift typical of established healthcare companies, with daily volatility of approximately 1.8%. The confidence intervals reflect increasing uncertainty over the 20-day period, with the 90% interval capturing roughly ±11% price movement from the current level.
